overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student exploring the house common room. The character walks past a mermaid fountain, through a tapestry-lined corridor, and into the main common room with a large fireplace and underwater gothic windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular chamber with central mermaid fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular chamber, observing the mermaid fountain from different angles

entered.detail: large stone statue of two mermaids in a circular pool
gothic stone arch leading to corridor
lit wall-mounted lantern with warm glow
curved stone seating along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks around a circular stone chamber featuring a central mermaid fountain. Gothic arches and wall sconces illuminate the space as the character moves toward a corridor entrance.

events.description: enters narrow stone corridor from the fountain chamber

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor, passing detailed tapestries and a suit of armor

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting a knight fighting a dragon
full suit of medieval armor holding a spear
lit wall lantern illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor lined with medieval tapestries depicting dragon battles. A suit of armor stands guard along the wall as the character progresses toward the common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin common room with grand fireplace

events.description: exits corridor into large common room with fireplace
approaches the lit fireplace and slows down

agents.ego_description: walking across the common room toward the large fireplace, passing leather sofas

notable_agents.action: student standing near the wall in the distance

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and serpent decorations
carved stone snakes and skulls atop the fireplace
dark leather couch with tufted upholstery
tall gothic stone pillar supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the character enters the spacious Slytherin common room dominated by a grand fireplace with serpent motifs. The room features gothic columns and leather furniture as the character approaches the warm hearth.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room window area with underwater view

events.description: turns away from fireplace and walks toward large windows

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the fireplace mantle, then turning to walk toward the large gothic windows

notable_agents.action: group of students gathered at tables near the windows

entered.detail: tall arched windows showing blue underwater light
study tables with books and magical artifacts

segments.scene_description: The character stops briefly to observe the fireplace decorations before turning toward the common room's large gothic windows, which glow with ethereal blue underwater light. Other students are visible studying at tables near the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded stone chamber through a narrow passage and into the expansive, underwater-lit Slytherin common room. It begins by circling a central mermaid fountain beneath gothic arches and wall sconces before moving toward a corridor entrance. As the character progresses, the space tightens into a dimly lit stone hallway lined with dragon-themed tapestries and a silent suit of armor. The scene then opens into the grand common room, where the camera glides past leather furniture and gothic columns toward a massive fireplace adorned with serpent motifs. Finally, the view shifts away from the warm hearth toward large gothic windows that glow with an ethereal blue light from the surrounding depths, revealing students studying nearby.
